metadata.seed: Oh, there's a couple things. My classwork has been really been bogging me down lately, and then while I'm still doing better at work, I'm still not where I want to be. I don't want to have to consciously think this is why I'm. I want to keep working on. And I'm not being so argumentative at work. And then my boyfriend has been, like I said earlier, really gritting on my nerves, and I don't, like, I told him the other day that I wanted to break up with him, but he told me he was going to change and that things would get better. So I'm kind of torn with whether or not to continue in their relationship or just let it go. And at the same time, I'm having a hard time keeping up with my schoolwork and getting everything done on time. And my homework isn't where I want it to be. Like, I feel like I can do better.

patient.query: Oh, there's a couple things. My classwork has been really been bogging me down lately, and then while I'm still doing better at work, I'm still not where I want to be. And then my boyfriend has been, like I said earlier, really gritting on my nerves, and I don't, like, I told him the other day that I wanted to break up with him, but he told me he was going to change and that things would get better. So I'm kind of torn with whether or not to continue in their relationship or just let it go. And at the same time, I'm having a hard time keeping up with my schoolwork and getting everything done on time. And my homework isn't where I want it to be. Like, I feel like I can do better.

I don't want to consciously think about this
I'm torn about the relationship
I can do better

patient.query: Yeah, it just feels like everything is piling up at once. I thought I could handle it, but lately, I’m just... I don’t know, I feel like I’m drowning in deadlines and expectations. It's hard to see a way out when I can't keep up with what feels like everyone else.

I can't keep up with everyone else

it’s hard to see past that

I guess it makes me feel... really vulnerable, like I’m not measuring up to what’s expected of me or what I expect of myself. It’s a lot to carry.

patient.query: Thank you, that... that really means a lot. It’s just hard to believe that I can find that peace again. Sometimes I feel like I'm just stuck in this cycle of stress and anxiety, and it’s exhausting. I guess I just want to feel like I’m moving forward, not just spiraling.
